message:
Merge PR #1280: fix: prevent feed curator OOM and unbounded file growth (#1233)

Replaces os.ReadFile with bounded seek-forward reads (1MB cap), adds
in-writer truncation at 10MB (keeps newest half via atomic rename+fsync),
and tightens file permissions to 0600.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/1280
Author: Avyukth
Co-authored-by: Avyukth <subhrajit.makur@hotmail.com>
